statement: In every magma, Equation 958 (`x = y * ((z * x) * (w * w))`) implies Equation 2254 (`x = (x * (y * (x * x))) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0980
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z x) (op w w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op y (op x x))) y)
